details.question: combien d'utilisateur a t'on dans la base
details.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS NB FROM DBA_USERS;
details.oracle_error:
ORA-00942: table or view does not exist
Help: https://docs.oracle.com/error-help/db/ora-00942/
checks:
FAIL: execution Oracle KO (ORA-00942: table or view does not exist
Help: https://docs.oracle.com/error-help/db/ora-00942/)

details.question: Quelles sont les 5 tables les plus utilisees cette semaine ?
details.sql: SELECT OBJECT_NAME, COUNT(*) AS NB FROM SMART2DSECU.UNIFIED_AUDIT_DATA WHERE ACTION_NAME='SELECT' AND OBJECT_NAME IS NOT NULL AND EVENT_TIMESTAMP>=SYSDATE-7 GROUP BY OBJECT_NAME ORDER BY NB DESC FETCH FIRST 5 ROWS ONLY;

details.question: Y a-t-il eu des creations de comptes sur les 30 derniers jours ?
details.sql: SELECT DBUSERNAME, OBJECT_NAME, EVENT_TIMESTAMP FROM SMART2DSECU.UNIFIED_AUDIT_DATA WHERE ACTION_NAME='CREATE USER' AND TRUNC(EVENT_TIMESTAMP) >= TRUNC(SYSDATE-30) ORDER BY EVENT_TIMESTAMP DESC;

details.question: Quel poste a ete le plus actif ce mois-ci ?
details.sql: SELECT DBUSERNAME, COUNT(*) AS NB FROM SMART2DSECU.UNIFIED_AUDIT_DATA WHERE TRUNC(EVENT_TIMESTAMP,'MM')=TRUNC(SYSDATE,'MM') GROUP BY DBUSERNAME ORDER BY NB DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY;

details.question: Sur les 48 dernieres heures, quels objets ont le plus change ?
details.sql: SELECT OBJECT_NAME, COUNT(*) AS NB FROM SMART2DSECU.UNIFIED_AUDIT_DATA WHERE ACTION_NAME IN ('INSERT','UPDATE','DELETE') AND EVENT_TIMESTAMP >= SYSDATE-2 ORDER BY NB DESC FETCH FIRST 48 ROWS ONLY;
details.oracle_error:
ORA-00937: not a single-group group function
Help: https://docs.oracle.com/error-help/db/ora-00937/
checks:
FAIL: execution Oracle KO (ORA-00937: not a single-group group function
Help: https://docs.oracle.com/error-help/db/ora-00937/)

details.question: Qui a fait la toute derniere action dans les traces ?
details.sql: SELECT DBUSERNAME, ACTION_NAME, EVENT_TIMESTAMP FROM SMART2DSECU.UNIFIED_AUDIT_DATA WHERE TRUNC(EVENT_TIMESTAMP) = TRUNC(SYSDATE-1) ORDER BY EVENT_TIMESTAMP DESC;

details.question: Quels sont les 3 objets les plus modifies ?
details.sql: SELECT OBJECT_NAME, COUNT(*) AS NB FROM SMART2DSECU.UNIFIED_AUDIT_DATA WHERE ACTION_NAME IN ('INSERT','UPDATE','DELETE') GROUP BY OBJECT_NAME ORDER BY NB DESC FETCH FIRST 3 ROWS ONLY;

details.question: Donne les 5 objets les plus utilises sur les 7 derniers jours.
details.sql: SELECT OBJECT_NAME, COUNT(*) AS NB FROM SMART2DSECU.UNIFIED_AUDIT_DATA WHERE ACTION_NAME='SELECT' AND OBJECT_NAME IS NOT NULL AND EVENT_TIMESTAMP>=SYSDATE-5 GROUP BY OBJECT_NAME ORDER BY NB DESC FETCH FIRST 5 ROWS ONLY;

details.question: Quel USERHOST est le plus actif ce mois ?
details.sql: SELECT DBUSERNAME, COUNT(*) AS NB FROM SMART2DSECU.UNIFIED_AUDIT_DATA GROUP BY DBUSERNAME ORDER BY NB DESC FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY;

details.question: Donne la derniere action globale en base, sans filtrer sur hier.
details.sql: SELECT ID, EVENT_TIMESTAMP, DBUSERNAME, ACTION_NAME, OBJECT_NAME, EVENT_TYPE FROM SMART2DSECU.UNIFIED_AUDIT_DATA WHERE TRUNC(EVENT_TIMESTAMP)=TRUNC(SYSDATE-1) ORDER BY EVENT_TIMESTAMP DESC;
checks:
FAIL: execution Oracle KO (ORA-00904: "EVENT_TYPE": invalid identifier
Help: https://docs.oracle.com/error-help/db/ora-00904/)
